nasb.text: The earth is given into the hand of the wicked; He covers the faces of its judges. If it is not He, then who is it?

esv.text: The earth is given into the hand of the wicked; he covers the faces of its judges— if it is not he, who then is it?

cnv.text: 全世界交在惡人的手中， 他蒙蔽世上審判官的臉， 如果不是他，那麼是誰呢？

ccb.text: 大地落入恶人手中， 蒙敝审判官眼睛的不是祂是谁？
